data.title: Lloyd’s of London to Maintain Coverage for Vessels in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Lloyd’s of London has announced its decision to continue offering insurance coverage for ships navigating the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic importance of this waterway, which is a critical passage for global oil transportation. The insurance market's commitment comes amid ongoing regional tensions that have raised concerns about the safety of maritime operations in the area. Lloyd’s assurance aims to support the shipping industry by mitigating risks associated with potential disruptions in this vital corridor. The decision underscores the market's role in providing stability and confidence to global trade routes.

data.title: Stake.com Transfers Over 22,000 SOL to Hot Wallet
data.description: At 19:54, Stake.com transferred 22,336.29 SOL to its hot wallet. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction involved a significant amount of SOL, valued at approximately $2 million. The movement of such a large quantity of SOL highlights the ongoing activity within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: U.S. Defense Secretary Hegseth: Operation Epic Fury Distinct from Other U.S. Wars
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has stated that Operation Epic Fury is unlike any other military engagement undertaken by the United States. According to Jin10, Hegseth emphasized the unique strategic and operational aspects of this mission, distinguishing it from previous U.S. military actions. He highlighted the unprecedented nature of the operation, which involves a combination of advanced technology and tactical innovation. Hegseth's remarks come amid ongoing discussions about the evolving nature of warfare and the U.S. military's role in global security. The Defense Secretary's comments underscore the importance of adapting to new challenges in the international arena.

data.title: Spot gold fell as much as 4% intraday, while spot silver fell as much as 8% intraday.
data.description: According to Gate data, spot gold fell as much as 4% to $4,623.57 per ounce. Spot silver fell as much as 8% to $69.26 per ounce.

data.title: The seven-day streak of net inflows ended yesterday, with Bitcoin spot ETFs experiencing a total net outflow of $164 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $164 million yesterday (March 18th, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was Fidelity ETF (FBTC), with a net outflow of $104 million. FBTC's historical total net inflow has reached $10.975 billion. This was followed by BlackRock ETF (IBIT), with a single-day net outflow of $33.9058 million. IBIT's historical total net inflow has reached $63.341 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $92.067 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.46%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $56.373 billion.

data.title: Binance Launches Eid al Fitr P2P Trading Promotion with Zero Fees and Cashback Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to launch a special promotion in celebration of Eid al Fitr, offering two exclusive activities for its P2P community: a zero-fee trading period and a cashback rewards challenge. The promotion aims to reward users with fee-free P2P trading and the opportunity to earn cashback on trading fees.

Promotion A, which allows users to enjoy zero P2P trading fees, will take place on 2026-03-20 from 00:00 (UTC) to 23:59 (UTC). During this period, eligible users and merchants trading in specified currencies, including PKR, SAR, EGP, KWD, JOD, QAR, OMR, IQD, and LBP, will benefit from 0% trading fees for both maker and taker orders.

Promotion B, scheduled from 2026-03-21 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-04 23:59 (UTC), encourages continued trading momentum post-Eid. The top 100 users ranked by total P2P trading volume in the eligible currencies can qualify to share a prize pool of 4,000 USDT as cashback on their paid P2P trading fees. The reward structure is tiered based on trading volume, offering cashback rates of 10%, 20%, and 30% for volumes ranging from $100,000 to above $750,000.

Cashback rewards will be distributed as Trading Fee Rebate Vouchers within four weeks after the promotion ends, with individual rewards capped at 300 USDT per user. Binance emphasizes that all distributed vouchers will expire within two weeks after distribution, urging eligible users to claim their vouchers promptly. The platform reserves the right to disqualify trades deemed as wash trades or market manipulation and may amend the terms and conditions at its discretion.

data.title: US Treasury Secretary: Will use Iranian oil to lower oil prices
data.description: US Treasury Secretary Bessant: We will use Iranian oil to lower oil prices. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $55.7024 million yesterday, reversing a six-day streak of net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $55.7024 million yesterday (March 18th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the BlackRock Stalled ETH ETF (ETHB), with a net inflow of $1.1265 million. ETHB's historical total net inflow has reached $146 million. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net outflow of $37.1086 million. FETH's historical total net inflow has reached $2.339 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $12.866 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.87%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $11.908 billion.

data.title: U.S. Investigates Tesla's Full Self-Driving System
data.description: The U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) is conducting an investigation into Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) system. According to Jin10, the probe aims to assess the safety and functionality of the autonomous driving technology. This investigation comes amid growing concerns about the reliability and safety of self-driving systems in the automotive industry. Tesla's FSD system has been under scrutiny as regulators seek to ensure that autonomous vehicles meet safety standards and do not pose risks to drivers and pedestrians. The outcome of this investigation could have significant implications for Tesla and the broader self-driving car market.

data.title: Israel Reduces Outbound Flights by 50% Following Missile Strike on Ben Gurion Airport
data.description: Israel has significantly reduced its outbound flight capacity by approximately 50% after a missile strike damaged aircraft at Ben Gurion Airport. According to Jin10, the attack, attributed to Iranian forces, has heightened tensions in the region, prompting Israel to take precautionary measures to ensure the safety of its airspace and passengers. The reduction in flights is part of a broader strategy to mitigate risks and maintain security amid escalating regional conflicts. Israeli authorities are closely monitoring the situation and coordinating with international partners to address the ongoing threats. The incident underscores the fragile security environment in the Middle East and the potential impact on global air travel.

data.title: Wall Street Focuses on Alibaba, Five Below, Micron, and Newmont
data.description: Alibaba, Five Below, Micron, and Newmont are drawing significant attention from Wall Street investors. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the key factors influencing these companies' market movements. Alibaba's performance is under scrutiny as investors assess its strategic initiatives and market position. Five Below is in the spotlight due to its recent financial results and growth prospects. Micron's stock is being closely watched following its latest earnings report and industry developments. Meanwhile, Newmont is attracting interest amid fluctuations in the commodities market. These companies are at the forefront of investor discussions as the market opens.

data.title: Binance Square Launches SIGN Token Reward Campaign
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new campaign on Binance Square's CreatorPad offers verified users the opportunity to unlock 1,968,000 SIGN token rewards by completing specific tasks. The activity period is set from 2026-03-19 09:30 (UTC) to 2026-04-02 23:59 (UTC), with token voucher rewards distributed before 2026-04-22.

Participants can join the campaign by clicking 'Join now' on the activity page and completing tasks to earn points and rank on the leaderboard. Tasks include creating posts on Binance Square with a minimum of 100 characters about the project, using the hashtag #SignDigitalSovereignInfra, tagging the $SIGN token, and mentioning the project’s Square account SignOfficial (@SignOfficial). Additionally, users can create optional social media posts following similar criteria. Following SIGN’s account on Binance Square and trading a minimum of $10 equivalent in SIGN are also part of the tasks.

Eligible users will earn points for each completed task, determining their rank on the leaderboard. The reward structure allocates 984,000 SIGN to the top 300 creators on the SIGN Global Project Leaderboard and another 984,000 SIGN to the top 300 eligible Chinese creators. The leaderboard data is displayed with a T+2 delay, and the snapshot date for calculating points is 2026-04-02.

Participants must complete account verification (KYC) to receive rewards, and certain restrictions apply, such as caps on rewards per country and disqualification for suspicious activities. Binance reserves the right to amend terms and conditions without prior notice and to disqualify participants who violate guidelines. The validity period for the token voucher is seven days from distribution, and participants must keep campaign-related posts published for at least 60 days after the activity ends.

data.title: The White House's registration of the "aliens.gov" domain has sparked speculation that Trump is about to reveal UFO secrets.
data.description: The White House has officially registered the domain "aliens.gov," which has appeared in the federal government's official domain name registry. The website currently has no content. Weeks earlier, Trump announced on Truth Social that he planned to declassify government files related to extraterrestrial life and unidentified aerial phenomena, and had instructed the Secretary of Defense and relevant agencies to identify and release all UFO-related documents. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth confirmed that the review of these files was underway but did not disclose a specific timeline. Former senior defense intelligence official Christopher Mellon stated that the government possesses a large amount of video evidence that the public has never seen, including videos from the onboard cameras of F-18 fighter jets, some of which were classified as unclassified in 2018 but have not yet been released to the public.

data.title: BTQ Technologies Implements Quantum-Resistant Bitcoin Prototype
data.description: BTQ Technologies has successfully launched a working implementation of BIP 360 on its Bitcoin Quantum testnet. According to NS3.AI, this testnet now includes over 50 miners and has surpassed 100,000 mined blocks. The prototype allows developers to experiment with quantum-resistant Bitcoin transactions. However, for widespread adoption, miners and users would need to transition to a separate blockchain rather than upgrading the existing Bitcoin network.

data.title: India's Power Demand Projected to Reach 459 Gigawatts by 2030
data.description: India's power ministry has projected that the country's maximum power demand will rise to 459 gigawatts by the end of the decade. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the anticipated significant expansion in both generation and storage capacity to meet this demand. The ministry's forecast underscores the need for substantial infrastructure development to support the growing energy requirements. This projection reflects India's ongoing efforts to enhance its energy capabilities in response to increasing consumption patterns. The ministry's outlook suggests a transformative period for the nation's power sector, necessitating strategic investments and advancements in technology to ensure sustainable growth.

data.title: A Los Angeles ride-hailing driver has been charged with using $2 million in COVID-19 relief loans to buy cryptocurrency.
data.description: Bruce Choi, a 34-year-old resident of Koreatown, Los Angeles, was arrested at San Francisco International Airport on Tuesday and charged with wire fraud and money laundering. Federal prosecutors allege that he used a fictitious company, "Premier Republic," to submit fraudulent economic damage disaster loan applications, obtaining approximately $2 million in COVID-19 business relief loans, which he then transferred to accounts on the cryptocurrency exchange Kraken to purchase cryptocurrencies. During the investigation, prosecutors seized nearly 40 BTC and other cryptocurrencies. If convicted, each count of wire fraud carries a maximum sentence of 30 years in prison, and the money laundering charge carries a maximum sentence of 10 years in prison.

data.title: CK Hutchison Focuses on Investment in Stable Legal Environments
data.description:
CK Hutchison Chairman Victor Li stated during an online performance meeting that after selling UK assets, the company will continue to focus on investing in countries that respect contractual agreements and have robust legal systems to protect investments. According to RTHK, Li emphasized the importance of projects with long-term stable cash flows and expressed interest in investing in such opportunities.

The group has fully divested its stake in UK Power Networks, and CK Infrastructure has completed the sale of a 70% stake in UK Rails. Li did not directly address whether a special dividend would be issued, noting that the group's financial position is strong and there is no pressure to sell any assets.

CK Hutchison's Co-Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer Frank Sixt mentioned that the board has not made any decisions regarding transactions in the company's global telecommunications business. He highlighted that the group has received various proposals and will explore and assess all potential opportunities.

Additionally, when asked about the possibility of a dual listing for Watsons, the group stated that no decision has been made regarding such a transaction.

data.title: Crypto.com is laying off approximately 12% of its workforce, with the CEO citing the need for AI transformation.
data.description: Crypto exchange Crypto.com announced it will lay off approximately 12% of its workforce, citing the need to adapt its business to the increasing capabilities of AI. According to the Straits Times, the layoffs affect about 180 employees. Crypto.com CEO Kris Marszalek stated on the X platform that companies that do not immediately undertake this transformation will fail, while those that act immediately and combine the best AI tools with top talent will achieve previously unattainable scale and precision. This layoff is the latest example of cost-cutting in the digital finance industry. Previously, cryptocurrency exchange Gemini Space Station Inc. laid off approximately 25% of its workforce earlier this year and closed its operations in the UK, Europe, and Australia. Jack Dorsey's Block Inc. announced last month that it would lay off nearly half of its workforce, citing its assessment that AI will transform the industry.

data.title: UK Residential Mortgage Options Reach Seven-Month Low
data.description: The availability of residential mortgage products in the UK has decreased to its lowest level in over seven months. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significant reduction in mortgage options for potential homebuyers. This decline comes amid ongoing economic challenges and uncertainties affecting the housing market. Analysts suggest that the reduction in mortgage products may impact the ability of individuals to secure financing for home purchases, potentially influencing the overall real estate market dynamics. The situation reflects broader financial trends and concerns within the UK economy, as lenders adjust their offerings in response to market conditions.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Crypto Exchange Reduces Workforce Amid AI Advancements
data.description: A prominent cryptocurrency exchange has announced plans to cut approximately 12% of its staff. Bloomberg posted on X that the decision is driven by the company's need to adjust its operations in response to the growing influence of artificial intelligence technologies. The exchange aims to streamline its business processes and enhance efficiency as AI continues to evolve and impact various sectors. This move reflects a broader trend in the industry, where companies are increasingly integrating AI to optimize their operations and remain competitive.
